description: Enterprise backend core — NestJS 11 + TypeScript + Prisma/PostgreSQL + Redis/BullMQ + Firebase Auth. Multi-tenant, RBAC, CQRS, event-driven.

features.name: notifications
features.title: Platform — Notifications module
features.description: In-app notification system that consumes ReminderDue signals from the activities module (crm/activities) and any future domain events that need user-facing delivery. Resolves the open question in §6 of the CRM plan around activity reminder delivery channel.
acceptance: Notification model: id, tenantId, userId, type, title, body, read, readAt, createdAt (soft-delete)
NotificationService injectable by other contexts to create notifications without coupling
Event handler that listens to ReminderDue (from crm/activities BullMQ job) and creates an in-app notification for the activity owner
GET /api/v1/notifications — paginated list for the authenticated user (own tenant, deletedAt: null)
PATCH /api/v1/notifications/:id/read — mark single notification as read
PATCH /api/v1/notifications/read-all — mark all as read
GET /api/v1/notifications/unread-count — returns unread count integer
Only the notification owner can read or mark their own notifications
Domain events emitted (NotificationCreated) and written to outbox
Endpoints protected with permissions notifications.read / notifications.update
Unit tests for all command and query handlers; coverage >= 80%

features.name: products_catalog
features.title: Catalog — Products & Services catalog module
features.description: New bounded context 'catalog/' for managing a multi-tenant product and service catalog. Covers full CRUD (create, edit, archive, list) of products/services with basic categorization (type: product/service, category), unit price, and unit of measure. The context exposes a ProductId branded type and a ProductQueryService so that the sales/ context can reference products by ID without importing catalog internals. No inventory or advanced pricing in this phase.
acceptance: Product model: id, tenantId, name, description, type (PRODUCT|SERVICE), category, unitPrice (Money VO), unitOfMeasure, status (ACTIVE|ARCHIVED), createdAt, updatedAt, deletedAt
POST /api/v1/products — create a product/service (products.create permission)
GET /api/v1/products — paginated list filtered by tenantId and deletedAt:null; supports filter by type/category/status (products.read permission)
GET /api/v1/products/:id — get product by id (products.read permission)
PATCH /api/v1/products/:id — update product fields (products.update permission)
DELETE /api/v1/products/:id — archive product (sets status=ARCHIVED, soft-delete, products.delete permission)
ProductId branded type exported from catalog-context.module.ts for use by other contexts
ProductQueryService exported from catalog-context.module.ts; provides findById(tenantId, productId) returning a lightweight read model (no domain internals leaked)
Domain events: ProductCreated, ProductUpdated, ProductArchived — emitted and written to outbox
Multi-tenant isolation: all queries filter by tenantId and deletedAt:null
Unit tests for all command and query handlers; coverage >= 80%
